title: Inverted result order with ORDER BY DESC and a DESC index.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(y INTEGER, z TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE INDEX t2yd ON t2(y DESC);
SELECT y FROM t2 WHERE y IN (1, 3, 5) ORDER BY y DESC;
SELECT z FROM t2 WHERE z IS NOT NULL ORDER BY z COLLATE 'C' DESC;
key_bug_features: ORDER BY DESC with a DESC index
